canonical_sha_composite.subject: feat(pearl_news): five-layout sidebar system + --layout CLI + governing spec (PR-2 of 2)
canonical_sha_composite.scope: Structural baseline — 5-layout system (default/dock/wide/editorial/scroll_story), 5-card sidebar markup, CSS

canonical_sha_composite.subject:
fix(pearl_news): kill WordPress wpautop phantom

that steals the sidebar grid cell
canonical_sha_composite.scope:
WordPress wpautop fix — prevents stray

tags from breaking the .article-container grid

canonical_sha_composite.subject: fix(pearl_news): restore PR #853 sidebar structure for v2 (operator git-first restore)
canonical_sha_composite.scope: Operator-authored restore of PR #853's 5-card sidebar into v2 templates (after a v2 commit had replaced it with a single static practice-card). Restored: exercise-card with toggleExercise + step dots, cta-card slot, 5-card density.

canonical_sha_composite.subject: feat(pearl_news): v2 — mini-app launcher + SDG bullets + disclaimer relocate + long-form Gen Z atoms + teacher-view rewrite
canonical_sha_composite.scope: cta-card replaces practice-label with mini-app launcher (reaction_id → app slug from reaction_to_app.yaml); SDG card grows to 3-bullet detail; new file pearl_news/config/reaction_to_app.yaml

canonical_sha_composite.subject: feat(pearl_news): interactive Hot Take Poll + Editorial Take submission + EI v2 ingest stub
canonical_sha_composite.scope: Adds clickable <button class=pn-poll-option> + <button class=pn-take-submit>; inline pnReaderSignal IIFE that POSTs to /wp-json/pearl-news/v1/signal with localStorage tally and mailto fallback; new file pearl_news/pipeline/reader_signal_ingest.py for aggregation

canonical_sha_composite.subject: feat(pearl_news): WP must-use plugin for /wp-json/pearl-news/v1/signal (Phase 2)
canonical_sha_composite.deployed_note: Deployed plugin exposes 10 endpoints (/signal, /poll, /editorial, /advocate, /freebie, /feedback + 4 GET variants). Repo plugin at d0075d31d implements only /signal + /signal/aggregate. Q-PNS-PLUGIN-DRIFT-01: operator accepted the lag for this PR; full plugin source pull deferred to a follow-up workstream.
canonical_sha_composite.scope: New file pearl_news/wp_plugin/pearl-news-signal.php (~280 LOC). REST routes: POST /wp-json/pearl-news/v1/signal, GET /wp-json/pearl-news/v1/signal/aggregate/<article_id>. Rate-limit + honeypot + IP-hash anonymization.

F2_cta_mini_app_launcher._note: H3 text varies ("Free Tools" in current renderer / "Free Practice Tool" in live 3724) — shape-checked only, not text-matched. cta-title + cta-body required.
F2_cta_mini_app_launcher.optional_when_no_app_deployed: Launch button suppressed; sidebar still renders the card
F2_cta_mini_app_launcher.secondary_anchor_marker: Read the practice in this article

F3_sdg_connection._note: Bullet count depends on sdg_news_topic_mapping.yaml lookup; synthetic probe article does not populate bullets. The parity gate verifies shape (h3 + badge); content is verified by tests/test_pearl_news_sidebar_parity.py against the live snapshot.

open_operator_questions.summary: Deployed WP plugin has 8 endpoints not in repo; operator approved accepting lag for this PR; follow-up workstream needed to either pull live source or author additional endpoints
Canonical is composite of 6 SHAs across PR #853 (on main), PR #1105 (on main), and 4 branch-only commits on agent/pearl-news-section-order-fix
